issues.description: Missing the Counter effect entirely. Card has two abilities: (1) a Counter ability triggered when your black Character with cost ≤5 would be K.O.'d, and (2) an OnPlay ability. Only OnPlay is present.
TrashFromHand is incorrect. The OnPlay effect should trash from deck (top of deck), not from hand. Should be TrashFromDeck or similar action targeting deck.

Counter ability missing entirely. Should include: trigger='Counter', condition checking LeaderHasType or similar for 'black Character with cost ≤5', and actions to place 3 cards from trash at bottom of deck.
